Spec: Create crates/locus-nlp with the NlpPipeline trait, NlpDoc/Token/Entity/Keyword/CorefChain types, an empty-result LocalPipeline (no model loading yet), a NimPipeline stub that returns NotImplemented, a `pipeline()` factory in lib.rs, and add the crate to the workspace Cargo.toml. See docs/plans/nlp-phase-a.md §A.1.
Acceptance Criteria: cargo check -p locus-nlp is green; cargo test -p locus-nlp runs at least one trait-roundtrip test; no other crate's behaviour changes; workspace cargo check still passes.

Spec: Implement docs/plans/nlp-phase-a.md §A.2: cache-dir model loader (download from GitHub Releases on miss/SHA-mismatch), WordPiece tokeniser via tokenizers crate, ort::Session inference, subword reassembly, UPOS→PosTag mapping. Use a distilled BERT POS tagger (vblagoje/bert-english-uncased-finetuned-pos exported to ONNX, INT8-quantised, ~50MB).
Acceptance Criteria: analyze() returns ≥ one Token per surface word for all three golden fixtures with non-Other POS tags ≥ 90 % of the time; warm p95 ≤ 30 ms on M1; cold first-call ≤ 100 ms after model load.

Spec: Implement docs/plans/nlp-phase-a.md §A.3: BIO span decoder, score thresholding (drop < 0.5), OntoNotes-5 → EntityLabel mapping table. Use distilled BERT NER fine-tuned on OntoNotes-5, ONNX + INT8-quantised, ~65MB. Cached at $XDG_CACHE_HOME/locus/models/ner.onnx.
Acceptance Criteria: All three golden fixtures (open_slack_with_sarah, remind_me_friday, summarise_doc_for_anna) pass with the expected entity labels; warm p95 ≤ 80 ms on M1; entities below score 0.5 are dropped.

Spec: Per §A.4: add AppNlp(Arc<dyn NlpPipeline>) state in src-tauri/src/lib.rs setup, change parse_intent signature to take it, attach the resulting NlpDoc to ParseIntentResult, expose nlp on the GraphQL ParseIntentResult, and have the orchestrator use entities to enrich Space metadata (Person→participants[], Date/Time→scheduled_at, Org/Product→topic_tags[]).
Acceptance Criteria: A GraphiQL query for parseIntent(input: "open Slack with Sarah at 3pm") returns nlp.entities containing the three expected entities; existing Tauri callers compile unchanged or are updated in the same diff; new :Space properties (participants, scheduled_at, topic_tags) are written by the orchestrator.
DB: New :Space properties (participants, scheduled_at, topic_tags) — written by orchestrator, no migration

Spec: Per §A.5: three JSON fixtures under crates/locus-nlp/tests/fixtures/, golden runner asserting expected entities are present with correct labels and score ≥ 0.5 (extra entities allowed), release-mode smoke benchmark over 50 iterations of the 3 fixtures, CI override via LOCUS_MODEL_DIR pointing at checked-in fixture models to skip the download path.
Acceptance Criteria: cargo test -p locus-nlp passes locally and in CI; the smoke benchmark fails the build if cold ≥ 1 s or warm p95 ≥ 150 ms; the download path is exercised by a separate manual `cargo test -p locus-nlp --features download-test` job.
